title: WarpsGUI
description: ✨ WarpsGUI «1.13 - 26.1» ✨ Homes and Warps in GUI ✅
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/t0iepFx.png)  
Simple but effective plugin for **infinite** Homes and Warps in GUI with changable icons, messages and even sounds!  
  
****UPDATED TO 26.1.2****  
  
Credit to the original author [[MrHardyCZ]](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/authors/mrhardycz.62830/).  
You can find his original plugin [[here]](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/%E2%9C%A8-warpsgui-%C2%AB1-8-1-14-%C2%BB-%E2%9C%A8-homes-and-warps-in-gui-%E2%9C%85.22484/).

****Fixes v4.0.0 (v4a)****
*   Fixed warps.homelimit.\* permission
*   Fixed an error when "/tpcancel" is called without an ongoing teleportation

****Additions v4.1.0 (v4e)****
*   Added selectable icons for homes
*   User can now select a home icon on home creation
*   User can now change a home icon in the edit home menu 
  
**Overview**  
  
![](https://i.imgur.com/NM9n8I9.png)  
  
![](https://i.imgur.com/mFADfcb.png)  
  
![](https://i.imgur.com/JMZ2pUQ.png)  
![](https://i.imgur.com/ntqY9Tx.png)  
  
**EditWarp GUI**

  

*   **Rename warp (Nametag icon)** \- rename warp using nice AnvilGUI
*   **Change icon (Current icon)** \- change icon of the warp, Icons menu contains all items in the game and even search
*   **Toggle the need for permissions (Banner icon)** \- toggle the need for permissions (warps.usewarp.<warp>)
*   **Remove warp (Barrier icon)** \- remove warp

**EditHome GUI**

  

*   **Rename home (Nameteg icon)** \- rename home using nice AnvilGUI
*   **Change icon (Current icon)** \- change icon of the home, Icons menu contains all items in the game and even search
*   **Remove home (Barrier icon)** \- remove home

![](https://i.imgur.com/xDlZvxa.png)  
![](https://i.imgur.com/U3K0lQF.png)  
![](https://i.imgur.com/q2Bb8ar.png)  
_If you want to decompile the plugin, feel free to do so._
_If you want to change the code, you are allowed to._
  
_This plugin contains the AnvilGUI API made by WesJD licenced under the MIT licence._
